analysis_layers.title: 比赛剧本层
analysis_layers.summary: Base case: Croatia 倾向不败或取胜, reference score 1-0. The model edge is +26.1 after fundamentals and Tianji overlay.
key_drivers: Base case: Croatia 倾向不败或取胜, reference score 1-0. The model edge is +26.1 after fundamentals and Tianji overlay.
Counter case: Ghana changes the read if lineup news improves, set pieces land, or the favorite is forced into a slow first half.
Draw case: becomes live if the first 30 minutes stay low-event and both sides protect transition space.
watch_triggers: confirmed starting XI differs from roster-depth baseline
late injury or suspension changes the strongest positional unit
